info.title: Signalhaven GPT Action API
info.description: This API provides dynamic action invocation, health checks, and deployment capabilities for the Signalhaven symbolic engine. Use /actions/list to enumerate available actions. All endpoints require Bearer authentication and return machine-readable JSON responses suitable for GPT plugins or automation.

get.summary: Check system uptime, health status, and current server timestamp
get.description: Returns comprehensive system health information including API status, storage status, deployment status, and current timestamp. Used for monitoring and GPT plugin health checks.

200.description: Healthy status with timestamp and version information

post.summary: Probe the current identity or service context for the calling agent
post.description: Performs identity verification and returns current identity status, stability metrics, and authentication context. Essential for GPT plugins to confirm system readiness.

200.description: Identity probe response with stability metrics and recommendations

post.summary: Recalibrate symbolic engine state and synchronize identity parameters
post.description: Performs a complete state recalibration of the symbolic engine, resetting identity parameters, emotional state, and active gene keys. Returns updated state information.

200.description: State recalibration complete with updated parameters

post.summary: Deploy or update the service using the provided configuration
post.description: Triggers deployment workflow for the symbolic engine. Used in build/deploy workflows to update the service with latest code changes.

200.description: Deployment response with status and message

post.summary: List all available actions for the current agent context
post.description: Returns a comprehensive list of all available symbolic handlers/modules and their descriptions. This is how dynamic actions are discovered by GPT plugins and other automation tools.

200.description: Array of action names, descriptions, and usage examples

post.description: Dynamically invoke any available symbolic action by name. Use 'list' as actionName to enumerate all available actions. This is the primary endpoint for GPT plugin dynamic action execution.

parameters.name: actionName
parameters.description: The name of the action to invoke. Use 'list' to get all available actions.

200.description: Action response or list of actions, depending on actionName

GenericInput.description: Flexible input for actions. All properties are optional and dynamic.

GenericResponse.description: Standard response for all API methods.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer authentication for all API endpoints.
